SnatchOut 2026

April 2026

SnatchOut 2026 Nottingham

Date: Saturday, April 25, 2026
Time: 5:30 PM Doors Open
Location: Mission House - The Dome, Unit 1, Ryan Business Park, Radford Road, Nottingham, NG7 7DH
Entry: Free Entry - Donations Welcome

Berean Study Bible Theme

Join us for the Berean Study Bible theme: "Save others by snatching them from the fire; and to still others show mercy tempered with fear, hating even the clothing stained by the flesh." An unforgettable worship experience to King Jesus, featuring humble worship leaders and ministers, an amazing atmosphere, and memories that will last a lifetime.

Event Highlights

  • Celebration of the resurrection of Christ
  • Drawing closer to Christ in worship
  • Seeing loved ones come to Christ
  • Time of fellowship and celebrations with other believers in Christ
